seoTitle: How to Assign a Task in ClickUp Easily
metaDescription: Learn how to assign tasks in ClickUp from any view, enable multiple assignees, and automate assignment rules to keep ownership clear.
intro: Clear ownership keeps projects moving, and ClickUp gives you a few different ways to assign work depending on how you like to view your tasks. This guide covers assigning from List, Board, or Table views, turning on collaborative multi-assignee tasks, and setting up automation rules so new tasks route to the right person without manual work each time.

steps.heading: Open the assignee column
steps.body: In your project list, locate the assignee column next to each task to begin assigning ownership.

steps.heading: Click the profile icon to assign
steps.body: Click the silhouette placeholder and select a team member from the pop-up directory to assign the task.

steps.heading: Use a keyboard shortcut to assign yourself
steps.body: Hover over a task and press the assign shortcut key to quickly add yourself as the owner without opening the full task card.

steps.heading: Enable multiple assignees
steps.body: Turn on the Multiple Assignees setting inside Space Settings if you want tasks to support collaborative ownership across teammates.

steps.heading: Automate assignment rules
steps.body: Open the Automations menu to build a trigger that automatically assigns new tasks based on category or priority.

steps.heading: Reassign in bulk when needed
steps.body: Use the bulk action toolbar to select multiple tasks and reassign them at once during sprint grooming or team restructuring.

faq.question: Can more than one person be assigned to a task?
faq.answer: Yes, once you enable the Multiple Assignees setting in Space Settings, tasks can have several collaborative owners.

faq.question: How do I check if a teammate is overloaded before assigning them?
faq.answer: Check the Workload view, which shows live team capacity so you can avoid assigning tasks to someone already stretched thin.

faq.question: Can I automatically assign tasks based on priority?
faq.answer: Yes, Workspace Rules let you set up automated assignment triggers based on conditions like priority or task category.

faq.question: Is there a faster way to reassign many tasks at once?
faq.answer: Yes, the bulk action toolbar lets you select multiple tasks and reassign them in a single action instead of updating each one individually.
